verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everything I am (everything I am) Everything I'll be (everything I'll be) I give it to you, Lord (I give it to you, Lord) And do it thankfully (thankfully) Every song I sing, every praise I bring, Everything I do is a gift to you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Everything I have (everything I have) All you've given me (all you've given me) I give it to you, Lord (I give it to you, Lord) And do it thankfully (thankfully)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every song I sing, Every praise I bring, everything I do, Is a gift to you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everything I am (everything I am) Everything I'll be (everything I'll be) I give it to you, Lord (I give it to you, Lord) And do it thankfully (thankfully)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every song I sing, Every praise I bring, everything I do, Is a gift to you, Is a gift to you.
